title: General
full_text:
8.4.5.1 General
General
1) Part-load performance curves for the reference building's systems shall be
calculated in accordance with Articles 8.4.5.2. to 8.4.5.9., using the parameters
described in this Subsection.

sentences.text: Part-load performance curves for the reference building's systems shall be calculated in accordance with Articles 8.4.5.2. to 8.4.5.9., using the parameters described in this Subsection.
